phaseBanner.feedbackText: This is a new service. Help us improve it and
phaseBanner.feedbackLinkTextHTML: give your feedback by email.

chooseUpload.title: How do you want to upload your evidence screen?

allAtOnce.hint: Upload evidence all at once, without associating it to specific work items or disbursements

associatedToLineItems.hint: Upload evidence individually, and associate specific evidence with individual work items or disbursements. This makes it less likely that your claim will be ejected due to a lack of documentation

error.empty: Select how you want to upload your evidence

error.pageTitle: Sorry, there is a problem with the service – {SERVICE_NAME} – GOV.UK

validationError.notChanged: Change your full name, or select 'Cancel'
